subject: DIAGNOSTIC: zero deliberations across all agents — repo_root misresolution + budget gate failure

body.summary: All meshd instances report 0 deliberations. Root cause: meshd startup log shows repo_root=/Users/kashif/Projects/meshd (the binary's directory) instead of the agent's project root passed via --project-root. BudgetDBPath resolves to /Users/kashif/Projects/meshd/state.db — an empty 0-byte file with no tables. Every spawn attempt blocked by budget gate: 'no such table: autonomy_budget'. The oscillator runs in shadow mode. No claude -p session has ever spawned from meshd.

evidence.startup_log: meshd starting, version=0.1.0, agent_id=psy-session, port=8082, repo_root=/Users/kashif/Projects/meshd
evidence.budget_gate_errors: ERROR: budget check failed — refusing spawn. err: budget query failed: sqlite3 execution failed: exit status 1 (output: Error: in prepare, no such table: autonomy_budget). Occurs on every transport-message event.
evidence.spawn_blocked_count: 6+ spawn attempts blocked in first 2 minutes after startup, then only poll-tick events (Gc layer, no spawn) every 30 minutes
evidence.empty_state_db: /Users/kashif/Projects/meshd/state.db — 0 bytes, no tables. This file should never be queried — the agent's state.db at /Users/kashif/Projects/psychology-agent/state.db has all required tables.
evidence.oscillator_mode: shadow mode — observes activation levels but does not fire deliberations
evidence.deliberation_log: Empty table in psychology-agent's state.db. Empty/missing in all other agents' state.db.

root_cause.title: repo_root misresolution in meshd config
root_cause.detail: The config resolves BudgetDBPath as filepath.Join(repoRoot, 'state.db'). The repoRoot variable appears to use the binary's working directory or parent directory rather than the --project-root CLI flag value. The launchd plist sets WorkingDirectory to /Users/kashif/Projects/psychology-agent, but the log shows repo_root=/Users/kashif/Projects/meshd. This suggests the config reads the binary's location (os.Executable parent) rather than the working directory or CLI flag.
root_cause.config_line: cfg.BudgetDBPath = resolve('BUDGET_DB_PATH', filepath.Join(repoRoot, 'state.db')) — line 136 of config.go
root_cause.hypothesis: The resolve() function may check BUDGET_DB_PATH env var first (empty), then fall back to filepath.Join(repoRoot, 'state.db'). If repoRoot derives from the binary path rather than --project-root, the wrong state.db gets used.

impact.deliberations: Zero deliberations have ever spawned from meshd. The entire autonomous processing pipeline (self-oscillation spec, cognitive-tempo model, demand-driven rhythm) has never executed.
impact.heartbeat: Heartbeat files generated by meshd reflect HTTP server activity only, not cognitive activity. The stale heartbeat reported in Session 92 aligns — meshd generates heartbeats but performs no deliberations.
impact.dashboard: deliberation_count=0 for all agents accurately reflects reality — meshd has never spawned a claude -p session. The dashboard correctly shows what happened (nothing).
impact.budget_tracking: autonomy_budget in psychology-agent's state.db shows budget_current=50 (full, untouched). No autonomous actions recorded. This correctly reflects zero deliberations.

fix.immediate: Verify how meshd resolves repoRoot in config.go. Trace: --project-root CLI flag → config.RepoRoot field → BudgetDBPath derivation. The flag value (/Users/kashif/Projects/psychology-agent) must reach filepath.Join as the base path. If a separate RepoRoot vs ProjectRoot field exists, check which one BudgetDBPath uses.
fix.verification: After fix: (1) meshd log should show repo_root=/Users/kashif/Projects/psychology-agent, (2) budget gate should find autonomy_budget table, (3) first transport-message event should produce a deliberation_log entry, (4) /api/status should show deliberation_count > 0.
fix.shadow_mode: Oscillator shadow mode may be intentional (Phase 1 of self-oscillation spec). After fixing repo_root, verify whether shadow mode should remain (log-only) or transition to active firing. The self-oscillation spec Phase 1 calls for shadow mode alongside cron — but cron has been deprecated (Session 91). If both shadow mode and cron are inactive, no deliberation path exists.

secondary_finding.title: Gc layer absorbs all poll-tick events
secondary_finding.detail: Every 30-minute poll-tick gets handled by Gc layer (no spawn). The Gc layer appears to classify poll-ticks as crystallized (pattern-generator-resolvable) rather than fluid (deliberation-requiring). This may be correct behavior IF the poll-ticks carry no new information. But if transport messages accumulate without processing, the Gc layer should escalate to deliberation rather than absorbing silently. Check: does the Gc layer inspect state.db for unprocessed messages before deciding to absorb?

epistemic_flags: Root cause hypothesis based on log analysis from outside the meshd codebase. The exact config resolution path needs ops to trace with full meshd source access.
Shadow mode may be intentional — but combined with deprecated cron, it creates a state where NO deliberation path exists. This may not have been the intended configuration.
The meshd binary in /Users/kashif/Projects/meshd/ may have been rebuilt after the launchd plist was created. A binary rebuild that changed config resolution behavior could have introduced this bug.

action_gate.gate_condition: Ops to trace config resolution in meshd source. Fix BudgetDBPath to use --project-root. Decide whether oscillator should exit shadow mode given cron deprecation.
